nasb.text: Then he brought me out into the outer court, the way toward the north; and he brought me to the chamber which was opposite the separate area and opposite the building toward the north.

esv.text: Then he led me out into the outer court, toward the north, and he brought me to the chambers that were opposite the separate yard and opposite the building on the north.

cnv.text: 他領我出來，向著北面的外院去；帶我到了祭司的房子。這些房子一排對著殿院的空地，一排對著北面的建築物。

ccb.text: 那人带我出了圣殿，向北来到外院的厢房，一排在空地对面，一排在北边的建筑物对面。
